name: codsworth
description: Plugin marketplace for Codsworth — build-verify-fix tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Codebase-aware specification engine. V3 flow-reversal (v4.0.0) adds brownfield pipeline: flow-mapper produces a grounded flow graph of the existing system, R2 walks the user through node-by-node hop confirmation in the main thread, R3 emits a flow-delta instead of an end-state spec. Greenfield and cosmetic modes retain the V2 pipeline (spec-type detection, source-inventory enumeration, ecosystem domain scouting). Forge plans. Foundry builds.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Autonomous build-verify-fix loop. V3 flow-reversal (v4.0.0): brownfield runs consume a flow-delta and dispatch packet-derived teammate prompts with upstream_anchor / prerequisite_hops / this_hop / downstream_contract / self_check blocks — no end-state description reaches teammates, eliminating endpoint-anchored plumbing hallucination. New flow-tracer INSPECT stream verifies forward-direction wiring (mirror of tracer's upstream check). Greenfield and cosmetic runs retain the V2 pipeline: pre-authored teammate prompts, router architecture, drift-prevention triad, 6-stream verification, defect grinding. Forge plans. Foundry builds.
